name: Salsa De Tomate Verde Cruda (Tomatillos)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the paper husks from the tomatillos.
2. Rinse thoroughly and chop coarsely.
3. Add the tomatillos to the blender along with the garlic, chiles, salt, and water.
4. Pulse until the ingredients are chopped finely but not blended.
5. Stir in the onion and coriander.
6. Serve slightly warmed.
